meaning: n.应景的,讨好的言语或行为adj.讨好的
examples: Not even in Syria do many believe such claptrap.
You learn more in one week watching this claptrap than you do all year on education TV.
Tangents include spam, blatant ads for services, and all manner of ad hominem claptrap.
And I loved those characters, particularly Claptrap, who turned a killfest into a laughfest.
